---
id: register-the-first-user
title: "Register the first user"
description: "Creates the initial super-admin account. **Only works when no users exist yet.**"
sidebar_label: "Register the first user"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Register the first user"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/auth/register"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates the initial super-admin account. **Only works when no users exist yet.**
Subsequent accounts must be created via an invitation link.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}

</Heading>
